title: Managing the Dangers of Iran's Nuclear Program
summary: On June 12, 2018, Professor of Practice Matthew Bunn presented "Managing the dangers of Iran's nuclear program" to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs in Norway.
body: In a June presentation to the Norwegian Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Matthew Bunn considered likely near- and medium-term consequences of President Trump's decision to withdraw from the nuclear deal with Iran, and suggested steps Norway and other countries could take to help manage the fallout. To view the presentation slides, see the PDF below.
